Please help to demonstrate the notability of the topic by citing [reliable secondary sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Reliable_sources "Wikipedia:Reliable sources") that are [independent](/wiki/Wikipedia:Independent_sources "Wikipedia:Independent sources") of the topic and provide significant coverage of it beyond a mere trivial mention. If notability cannot be shown, the article is likely to be [merged](/wiki/Wikipedia:Merging "Wikipedia:Merging"), [redirected](/wiki/Wikipedia:Redirect "Wikipedia:Redirect"), or [deleted](/wiki/Wikipedia:Deletion_policy "Wikipedia:Deletion policy"). *Find sources:* ["The Undoing Project"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22The+Undoing+Project%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22The+Undoing+Project%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22The+Undoing+Project%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22The+Undoing+Project%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22The+Undoing+Project%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22The+Undoing+Project%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(January 2026)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

2016 book by Michael Lewis

The Undoing Project  
A Friendship That Changed Our Minds

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Front cover | |
| Author | [Michael Lewis](/wiki/Michael_Lewis "Michael Lewis") |
| Language | English |
| Genre | [Non-fiction](/wiki/Non-fiction "Non-fiction") |
| Publisher | [W. W. Norton & Company](/wiki/W._W._Norton_%26_Company "W. W. Norton & Company") |
| Publication date | December 6, 2016 |
| Publication place | United States |
| Media type | Print (Hardcover), Audiobook |
| Pages | 368 |
| [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") | [978-0-393-25459-4](/wiki/Special:BookSources/978-0-393-25459-4 "Special:BookSources/978-0-393-25459-4") (Hardcover) |
| Preceded by | *[Flash Boys](/wiki/Flash_Boys "Flash Boys")* |

***The Undoing Project: A Friendship That Changed Our Minds*** is a 2016 nonfiction book by American author [Michael Lewis](/wiki/Michael_Lewis "Michael Lewis"), published by [W.W. Norton](/wiki/W.W._Norton "W.W. Norton"). *The Undoing Project* explores the close partnership of Israeli [psychologists](/wiki/Psychologist "Psychologist") [Daniel Kahneman](/wiki/Daniel_Kahneman "Daniel Kahneman") and [Amos Tversky](/wiki/Amos_Tversky "Amos Tversky"), whose work on [heuristics in judgment and decision-making](/wiki/Heuristics_in_judgment_and_decision-making "Heuristics in judgment and decision-making") demonstrated common errors of the human [psyche](/wiki/Psyche_(psychology) "Psyche (psychology)"), and how that partnership eventually broke apart.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Undoing_Project&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

According to the [review aggregator](/wiki/Review_aggregator "Review aggregator") Book Marks, *The Undoing Project* was met largely by favorable reviews.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3) Writing in *[The New Yorker](/wiki/The_New_Yorker "The New Yorker")*, law professor [Cass Sunstein](/wiki/Cass_Sunstein "Cass Sunstein") and economist [Richard Thaler](/wiki/Richard_Thaler "Richard Thaler") praised the book's ability to explain complex concepts to lay readers as well as turn the biographies of Tversky and Kahneman into a page-turner: "He provides a basic primer on the research of Kahneman and Tversky, but almost in passing; what is of interest here is the collaboration between two scientists."[[4]](#cite_note-4) [Jennifer Senior](/wiki/Jennifer_Senior "Jennifer Senior") of *[The New York Times](/wiki/The_New_York_Times "The New York Times")* wrote that "At its peak, the book combines intellectual rigor with complex portraiture. During its final pages, I was blinking back tears, hardly your typical reaction to a book about a pair of academic psychologists."[[5]](#cite_note-5)

Retrieved February 8, 2017.
